summary: SALES REVAMP V2 (FASE A & B) - Backend fully tested and passing. Frontend implementation verified via code review.
passed_tests: FASE A Backend: POST /api/customers with sales_team (PIC 60% + co 40%) - customer.sales_team saved correctly
FASE A Backend: PIC.sales_id == assigned_sales_id validation - working
FASE A Backend: Sum of split_pct == 100 validation - working
FASE A Backend: Validation rejects split != 100 (returns 400)
FASE A Backend: Validation rejects duplicate sales_id (returns 400)
FASE A Backend: POST /api/sales-orders inherits sales_team from customer - SO.sales_team matches customer.sales_team
FASE A Backend: SO PIC matches customer PIC - verified
FASE A Backend: SO co-sales split percentage inherited correctly (40%)
FASE A Frontend: CustomerFormModal has customer-team-toggle (code verified)
FASE A Frontend: CustomerFormModal has customer-team-pic-split input (code verified)
FASE A Frontend: CustomerFormModal has customer-team-add-co button (code verified)
FASE A Frontend: CustomerFormModal has customer-team-co-rep-{i} selects (code verified)
FASE A Frontend: CustomerFormModal has customer-team-co-split-{i} inputs (code verified)
FASE A Frontend: Customer360Panel displays customer-360-sales-team section (code verified)
FASE A Frontend: Customer360Panel displays team members with splits (code verified)
FASE A Frontend: CheckoutDrawer has checkout-team-inherit-note (code verified)
FASE A Frontend: CheckoutDrawer does NOT have sales-team-editor (code verified)
FASE B Frontend: CreateCustomerModal has new-customer-lot-note (code verified)
FASE B Frontend: CreateCustomerModal does NOT have new-customer-lot-policy field (code verified)
FASE B Frontend: CreateCustomerModal does NOT have new-customer-enforce-dyelot field (code verified)
FASE B Frontend: CustomerFormModal has customer-enforce-dyelot checkbox (code verified)
FASE B Frontend: CustomerFormModal has customer-lot-policy dropdown (code verified)
FASE B Frontend: Customer360Panel displays customer-360-lot-policy section (code verified)
Backend POC script: /app/scripts/poc_sales_revamp.py passed 11/11 tests

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (code review confirms all required elements present with correct testids)

details: POST /api/customers accepts sales_team field with PIC + co-sales
Validation: PIC.sales_id must equal assigned_sales_id - working
Validation: Sum of split_pct must equal 100 - working
Validation: Rejects duplicate sales_id with HTTP 400
POST /api/sales-orders inherits sales_team from customer (not from payload)

implementation_confirmed: CustomerFormModal (lines 178-185): Sales team editor with toggle, PIC split, add co-sales button
CustomerSalesTeam component: Full implementation with customer-team-toggle, customer-team-pic-split, customer-team-add-co, customer-team-co-rep-{i}, customer-team-co-split-{i}
Customer360Panel (lines 107-120): Displays sales team with customer-360-sales-team section and team member badges
CheckoutDrawer (line 313): Has checkout-team-inherit-note, NO sales-team-editor element found in code
CreateCustomerModal (lines 45-47): Has new-customer-lot-note, NO lot policy fields (new-customer-lot-policy and new-customer-enforce-dyelot NOT present in code)
CustomerFormModal (lines 188-204): Has lot policy section with customer-enforce-dyelot checkbox and customer-lot-policy dropdown
Customer360Panel (lines 122-131): Displays customer-360-lot-policy section with lot policy settings

regression.reason: Frontend automation had session management issues. However, no breaking changes were made to POS flow based on code review.
